topic: The white-label client portal — what a Sanad office's clients see when they log in
format: Walk through a feature in 4-5 steps: what triggers it, what it does, what it prevents, who saves time
post:
A client emails a Sanad office at 9 a.m. asking for their employee's work permit status.

Without a portal, someone stops what they're doing, checks a spreadsheet or a WhatsApp thread, types a reply, and hopes the information is still accurate.

That's how Sanad offices burn two hours a day on status questions alone.

SmartPro Hub's white-label client portal cuts that loop out completely.

Here's how it works:

The client logs in under the Sanad office's own brand. They see their employees, permit expiry dates, document status — live, not a screenshot from last week.

If a visa expires in 30 days, the client already sees it. They don't need to ask.

If a government filing is in progress, there's a status update right there. No follow-up call.

The Sanad office didn't send anything. The system did.

We built this because Sanad offices hit a ceiling — not from lack of skill, but because manual updates simply don't scale past 20 clients. There's only so many times you can re-answer the same question before it starts costing you real money.

SmartPro Hub lets offices grow past that ceiling without adding another coordinator to the payroll.

The portal is included from OMR 25/month. No custom development. No long wait to get started.

What's the one client question your team answers on repeat every single week?

Book a 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=feature-spotlight
